intent: Ensure asynchronously wrapped handlers can be registered under multiple routes without false endpoint conflicts.
commit_subject: Fix wrapped view function comparison

intent: Prevent concurrent shortcode rendering from sharing mutable buffered data.
commit_subject: markup/goldmark: Fix data race in the hugocontext wrapper

intent: Ensure page collections are rebuilt after content changes instead of retaining stale initialization state.
commit_subject: hugolib: Fix Pages reinitialization on rebuilds

intent: Allow image metadata access to safely report absence for images without metadata.
commit_subject: resources/image: Fix nilpointer for images with no Exif

intent: Allow module routes to derive a default endpoint when callers omit one.
commit_subject: endpoint is optional for modules.  This fixes #86

intent: Prevent repeatedly self-scheduling tasks from starving other runtime work.
commit_subject: runtime: fix possible starvation when using lifo slot (#5686)

intent: Ensure a closing bounded channel wakes a receiver after a reserved send is cancelled.
commit_subject: sync: fix missing notification during mpsc close (#2854)

intent: Consume nested optional and newtype payloads correctly when deserializing ignored values.
commit_subject: Fix handling of option and newtype in IgnoredAny

intent: Honor annotation-controlled null handling consistently across adapter creation and execution.
commit_subject: Fixed nullSafe usage. (#1555)

intent: Prevent indented shortcode output from exposing internal rendering markers.
commit_subject: Fix RenderShortcodes leaking context markers when indented

intent: Allow refinement callbacks to be conditionally executed based on the current parse payload.
commit_subject: feat: allow 'when' parameter in .superRefine (#5741)

intent: Allow callers to choose the text encoding used when opening application and blueprint resources.
commit_subject: add encoding parameter to open_resource

intent: Allow route registration callers to disable automatic handling of method-discovery requests.
commit_subject: Add kwarg to disable auto OPTIONS on add_url_rule

intent: Allow test request builders to model alternate host subdivisions and URL schemes without constructing a full base URL.
commit_subject: Allow to specify subdomain and/or url_scheme in app.test_request_context()

intent: Allow file users to cap the buffer size used by asynchronous reads and writes.
commit_subject: fs: add `set_max_buf_size` to `tokio::fs::File` (#6411)

intent: Allow custom serialization errors to accept string-convertible message inputs.
commit_subject: feat(errors): Switch Error::custom to use Into<String>

intent: Allow channel-closure observation through shared sender references.
commit_subject: sync: change chan `closed(&mut self)` to `closed(&self)` (#2939)

intent: Allow runtime execution methods to be called through shared runtime references.
commit_subject: Make threadpool::Runtime methods take &self (#1140)

intent: Expose each enum variant ordinal to serializer implementations.
commit_subject: Expose variant index to Serializer

intent: Allow applications to disable constructor-bypassing allocation during deserialization.
commit_subject: Add `GsonBuilder.disableJdkUnsafe()` (#1904)

intent: Allow static-file cache lifetime defaults to be configured while preserving per-file overrides.
commit_subject: Expose send_file max-age as config value, #433.

intent: Provide fallback callbacks with access to the original input that failed validation.
commit_subject: Pass input into catchValue

intent: Use one consistent public name for the URL transformation helper across its definition and callers.
commit_subject: Rename Transform to AbsURL

intent: Normalize capitalization of the code-owner lookup API across implementations and references.
commit_subject: Rename Codeowners() to CodeOwners()

intent: Align code-block context method names with the concepts they expose across the rendering stack.
commit_subject: CodeblockContext method renames

intent: Use transformation-oriented terminology consistently for the content rewriting interface and its references.
commit_subject: Rename interface contentRewriter to contentTransformer

intent: Clarify the fixed-size sequence deserialization method name across the trait and implementations.
commit_subject: rename deserialize_fixed_size_array to deserialize_seq_fixed_size

intent: Align newtype visitation terminology across deserializer traits, implementations, and tests.
commit_subject: Rename visit_simple to visit_newtype

intent: Align enum newtype-variant visitation terminology across the deserialization stack.
commit_subject: Rename visit_enum_simple to visit_newtype_variant

intent: Use tuple and struct terminology consistently for enum variant visitors and their call sites.
commit_subject: Rename de::VariantVisitor::visit_{map,seq} to visit_{struct,tuple}

intent: Rename the value-conversion deserializer abstraction consistently across definitions, implementations, and imports.
commit_subject: Rename ValueDeserializer trait to IntoDeserializer

intent: Consolidate asynchronous descriptor access under a clearer API name and remove the redundant alternative.
commit_subject: io: rename `AsyncFd::with_io()` and rm `with_poll()` (#3306)

intent: Use delimiter terminology consistently for configurable separated-value parsing.
commit_subject: Rename CSV option from comma to delimiter

intent: Align the serialization trait core operation name across implementations and invocations.
commit_subject: Rename Serialize::visit to Serialize::serialize

intent: Move file and stream helpers off deprecated standard-library APIs while preserving behavior.
commit_subject: all: Replace deprecated ioutil with io and os

intent: Use the compatibility path-conversion API so path objects remain supported on older runtimes.
commit_subject: Use compat fspath instead of os.fspath When 7ba35c4 was cherry-picked it introduced the usage of os.fspath which is not supported on Python <3.6

intent: Move timer call sites to the supported timeout API while retaining deadline behavior.
commit_subject: timer: Replace Handle::deadline with Handle::timeout (#1074)

intent: Replace deprecated one-time initialization constants across platform implementations and tests.
commit_subject: chore: remove usage of deprecated ONCE_INIT (#1281)

intent: Adopt the direct reference-count API for raw wake handles while preserving ownership semantics.
commit_subject: runtime: use `Arc::increment_strong_count` instead of `mem::forget` (#5872)

intent: Use the response object header collection API instead of maintaining a local header patch helper.
commit_subject: use existing response.vary property to set vary header closes #2345

intent: Replace hand-written slice equality helpers with the standard generic comparison API.
commit_subject: all: Use slices.Equal

intent: Move template data lookups from a deprecated site-scoped API to the current global API.
commit_subject: Replace deprecated site.Data with hugo.Data in tests

intent: Migrate cache age configuration and comparisons to duration-aware APIs.
commit_subject: cache/filecache: Use time.Duration for maxAge

intent: Move JSON parsing call sites from the legacy parser to the streaming reader API.
commit_subject: Use JsonReader internally rather than JsonParserJavacc.

intent: Adopt the upstream sink trait across channel implementations and remove the local duplicate.
commit_subject: Use Sink trait from futures-sink-preview (#1244)

intent: Move markup conversion from the legacy parser integration to the maintained replacement.
commit_subject: Improve Org mode support: Replace goorgeous with go-org

intent: Reject malformed static-file paths with a client error instead of treating them as missing files.
commit_subject: Raise BadRequest if static file name is invalid

intent: Reject new-content targets that escape the permitted project path.
commit_subject: create: Validate the target path in hugo new

intent: Reject aliases containing unsafe control characters or trailing whitespace.
commit_subject: Add "control code" and "trailing space" to alias validation

intent: Reject registration of adapters for a core scalar type whose handling must remain built in.
commit_subject: Don't permit a type adapter for String to be registered.

intent: Reject date inputs that only partially match the expected format.
commit_subject: Fail when parsing invalid local date (#2134)

intent: Reject sparse tuple inputs before defaults can mask missing required positions.
commit_subject: fix(v4): reject tuple holes before required defaults (#5900)

intent: Ignore non-enumerable object properties during record validation.
commit_subject: fix: skip non-enumerable properties in record validation (#5719)

intent: Fail configuration loading when the selected default language is not defined.
commit_subject: Fail on invalid defaultContentLanguage

intent: Reject unsupported private-use language tags during language configuration.
commit_subject: Validate private use language tags

intent: Reject impractically large sequence requests before allocation can panic.
commit_subject: tpl: add sanity check to prevent panic in seq on big nums

intent: Distinguish path separators from application-object delimiters when parsing import targets.
commit_subject: ignore colon with slash when split app_import_path Flask currently supports importing app through a combination of module path and app variable name, such as '/usr/app.py:my_app'. When the module path contains a colon, it will conflict with this import way and a `flask.cli.NoAppException` will be raised.

intent: Prevent prototype-manipulating keys from being copied through catch-all object validation.
commit_subject: fix(v4): skip __proto__ key in object catchall (#5898)

intent: Keep proxy-related environment variables available to configured subprocesses and document the default.
commit_subject: config/security: Allow proxy variables in subcommands

intent: Include the platform-wide application-data environment in subprocess security defaults and documentation.
commit_subject: config/security: Add PROGRAMDATA to the osenv allowlist

intent: Allow footnote backlink markup to be configured and honor it during Markdown rendering.
commit_subject: markup/goldmark: Enhance footnote extension with backlinkHTML option

intent: Expose deletion-style markup as a configurable extension and wire it into rendering.
commit_subject: markup/goldmark: Add the Hugo Goldmark Extras "delete" extension

intent: Allow configured content to be omitted from generated sitemaps.
commit_subject: tpl/tplimpl: Optionally exclude content from sitemap

intent: Allow table-of-contents lists to be rendered with a configurable list style.
commit_subject: markup/tableofcontents: Add config option for ordered list

intent: Allow East Asian text handling to be enabled through markup configuration.
commit_subject: markup/goldmark: Add CJK extension

intent: Expose the extended markup feature group through configuration and activate its components during conversion.
commit_subject: markup/goldmark: Support extras extension

intent: Allow adjacent-page navigation ordering to be configured separately for site-wide and section-local traversal.
commit_subject: Add config options page.nextPrevSortOrder/nextPrevInSectionSortOrder

intent: Accept module projects with minimal metadata while keeping dependency collection behavior consistent.
commit_subject: Make the "is this a Hugo Module" logic more lenient

intent: Produce timezone-aware session expiration values using the standard datetime facility.
commit_subject: session expiration datetime is UTC timezone-aware

intent: Represent null raw pointers through the standard pointer helpers in runtime and test code.
commit_subject: chore: use ptr::{null, null_mut} instead of 0 as *{const, mut} (#1333)

intent: Support serializing calendar dates by using the date abstraction provided by the standard library.
commit_subject: Add datetime.date support to JSONEncoder

intent: Support serializing data-class instances through the standard data-class conversion facility.
commit_subject: support dataclass in JSONEncoder

intent: Provide built-in serialization and deserialization for universally unique identifiers.
commit_subject: Added UUID as a default type supported by Gson.

intent: Support deserializing boxed C strings by using the standard foreign-string type.
commit_subject: Add Deserialize impl for CStr

intent: Provide asynchronous file copying by composing the existing file and buffered I/O facilities.
commit_subject: fs: add fs::copy (#2079)

intent: Support decimal values in JSON output through their stable string representation.
commit_subject: jsonify encodes decimal to str

intent: Support property-map deserialization using the standard properties collection type.
commit_subject: Fixed issue 87 by adding support for deserialization of java.util.Properties

intent: Support byte-buffer range responses by recognizing in-memory byte streams.
commit_subject: Allow partial content on bytesio

intent: Support deserializing enum-keyed maps with their standard collection implementation.
commit_subject: Support EnumMap deserialization (#2071)

intent: Allow streams to collect directly into ordered sets.
commit_subject: stream: impl `FromStream` for `BTreeSet` (#7954)

intent: Add coverage for end-of-input and unterminated attribute cases in absolute-URL transformation.
commit_subject: transform: Complete test statement coverage

intent: Add coverage for newtype deserialization paths that do and do not carry an explicit wrapper marker.
commit_subject: Complete coverage of ContentRefDeserializer::deserialize_newtype_struct

intent: Add coverage for word and rune counting across ASCII, non-ASCII, and invalid inputs.
commit_subject: tpl: Add tests for word and rune counting

intent: Add integration coverage for resource lookup success and empty-name handling.
commit_subject: resources/tpl: Add a test for resources.Get

intent: Strengthen parser tests by asserting returned values rather than only checking that parsing completes.
commit_subject: test: add result verification to test cases (#5473)

intent: Add coverage for empty tuple and empty-structure variants in untagged enum deserialization.
commit_subject: Test special cases that reaches SeqRefDeserializer::deserialize_any len==0 condition

intent: Add regression coverage for round-tripping both registered subtypes and the registered base type.
commit_subject: New failing test for RuntimeTypeAdapters!

intent: Add compile-failure coverage for conflicting enum tagging configurations.
commit_subject: Test the new errors on conflicting enum tags

intent: Add round-trip coverage for recursive collection graphs.
commit_subject: Test that GraphAdapterBuilder works with collections.

intent: Add integration coverage for dictionary construction and its size limits.
commit_subject: tpl/collections: Add an integration test for collections.D
